Engineering Manager, Customer Experience

Location

New York, NY

Employment Type

Full time

Department

Engineering

Compensation

  • $245K – $330K • Offers Equity

The salary or hourly rate range may be inclusive of several levels that would be applicable to the position. Final salary or hourly rate will be based on a number of factors including, level, relevant prior experience, skills, and expertise. This range is only inclusive of base salary or hourly rate, not benefits or equity.

Please note: We encourage all candidates to keep their cameras on during video interviews to help us build a personal connection. If you need an alternative arrangement, please let us know and we'll work with you. New hires participate in an in-person onboarding experience at one of our offices.
